description_long: This is a compact, modern quadcopter drone with a sleek, angular body finished in matte black. It features four extended arms, each supporting a single rotor with two-blade propellers, arranged symmetrically around the central chassis. The body is streamlined, with subtle branding and a central panel that likely houses the main electronics and battery. The landing gear consists of four short, fixed legs integrated into the ends of each arm, providing stable support when on the ground. The drone's design suggests it is lightweight, likely constructed from durable plastic and composite materials, with no visible camera or propeller guards. Its overall appearance is utilitarian and robust, suitable for recreational or light commercial use in urban environments.
description: A sleek, matte black quadcopter drone with four rotors and fixed landing legs, designed for stability and lightweight operation. The body is angular and compact, with no visible camera or propeller guards.
description_view_0: Front three-quarter view showing the central body, all four rotors, and the integrated fixed landing legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile of the body and the alignment of the rotors and arms.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the symmetry of the arms and rotors, as well as the rear landing legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the side profile and rotor arrangement from the other direction.
